name: My Light Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Mix the crumbs, margarine, cinnamon, and sugar.
Press into the bottom of a 10-inch spring form pan.
Filling:
Blend the cottage cheese until smooth. Add sugar or an equivalent amount of artificial sweetener and blend until smooth. Add eggs, then vanilla, and Cointreau. Pour over the crust.
Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. The cake will appear slightly puffed but should not brown. Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes.
Topping:
Blend yogurt, sugar or an equivalent amount of artificial sweetener, and vanilla. Spoon over the cooled cake. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Cool to room temperature and chill overnight before serving with any desired fruit topping.
